# Jacobs

**Category:** EPC / Commissioning  
**Website:** https://www.jacobs.com/

## Headline
Global infrastructure delivery partner relevant to planning and scaling AI-ready facilities.

## Overview
Jacobs is relevant to buyers evaluating program-scale infrastructure delivery, engineering advisory support, and execution readiness. In the directory, it serves as a strong comparator for teams that may need a delivery partner rather than only hardware or colocation providers.

## Key capabilities
- engineering advisory support
- program and delivery coordination
- complex infrastructure execution readiness

## Best fit for
- large enterprise or developer-led infrastructure plans
- organizations needing delivery-program support
- teams comparing execution partners for complex buildouts

## Considerations
Most useful in a comparison set with EPC, commissioning, and infrastructure-delivery specialists.
